display.name: Schooling Fish
display.author: prism
display.blurb: A tight school of silver fish moving as one organism through a tropical reef, dappled light, slow camera orbit at depth.

annotation.technical_notes: A dense swarm of custom shapes resembling crystalline crosses is animated via per-frame equations to form an undulating 3D sheet. Bass transients drive the amplitude of the wave-like displacement, while treble frequencies modulate the individual particle rotation and brightness. Low decay in the feedback loop preserves a subtle trail behind the dispersing swarm.
